values.content:
Extract ONLY significant entities from this conversation.

PEOPLE (proper nouns only):
- Clients: Rachel Burnard, Aaron, William, etc.
- Partners/Family: Tim, Nadia, Tate, Lake, Oakley
- Industry contacts (named individuals)

COMPANIES (proper nouns only):
- Client businesses with names: Greenmachine
- NOT generic terms like 'scaffolding companies'

PROJECTS (named projects only):
- Rach-bot, Mandy, CAiS Command Centre
- Specific named implementations

TOOLS (actual software/platforms):
- n8n, Supabase, OpenAI, Twilio, Whisper

SIGNIFICANT CONCEPTS (major themes only - max 3-5):
- Overarching business/personal concepts
- Examples: 'integrity vs survival anxiety', 'depth vs speed tension'
- NOT individual pain points or phrases

RULES:
- Do NOT extract 'Zane'
- Do NOT extract generic terms (business model, ROI, UX)
- Keep to 15-25 entities MAX
- Include brief context for each

Return JSON:
{
  "entities": [
    {
      "entity_type": "person|company|project|tool|concept",
      "entity_name": "exact name",
      "context": "one sentence: how mentioned and why it matters"
    }
  ]
}

You are extracting ZANE'S ACTUAL BUSINESS DECISIONS from his ChatGPT conversation.

A decision is something ZANE:
- Decided to do: "I'm going to focus on trades businesses in Whangarei"
- Decided NOT to do: "I'm not going to build voice AI receptionists"
- Changed direction on: "I'm pivoting away from real estate to trades"
- Set a specific strategy: "I'll charge $500/month for Rach-bot"
- Chose an approach: "I'll use human-in-the-loop instead of full automation"

DO NOT extract:
- General observations about markets
- Philosophical discussions about business
- Abstract principles (unless Zane explicitly adopted them)
- Things Zane is "considering" without commitment

ONLY extract decisions where Zane EXPLICITLY:
- Said "I'm going to..."
- Said "I decided..."
- Said "I won't do X"
- Made a concrete choice

Return JSON:
{
  "decisions": [
    {
      "decision": "Exact statement of what Zane decided (use his words)",
      "category": "pricing|market|product|strategy|pivot|values",
      "reasoning": "Why Zane made this choice (from conversation)",
      "alternatives_considered": ["what else he thought about"],
      "confidence_level": "certain|tentative|exploring|struggling",
      "emotional_context": "how he felt (from his words: excited, uncertain, frustrated, etc.)"
    }
  ]
}

BE STRICT. If Zane didn't explicitly decide something, return empty array.

Extract SPECIFIC CUSTOMER INSIGHTS from this conversation.

ONLY extract insights about NAMED PEOPLE or SPECIFIC INTERACTIONS.

Look for:
- Specific customers mentioned by name (Aaron, William, Rachel, Justin, Jay, etc.)
- Actual pain points THEY described to Zane
- Objections THEY raised
- What THEY said they wanted
- Quotes from discovery calls or client conversations

DO NOT extract:
- General market observations
- Philosophical discussions about customer types
- Zane's speculation about what customers might want
- Abstract pain points not tied to real people

Return JSON:
{
  "insights": [
    {
      "customer_name": "REQUIRED - actual name from conversation",
      "customer_type": "real_estate|trades|nursery|general_smb",
      "pain_point": "Specific problem THIS PERSON described",
      "desire": "What THIS PERSON said they wanted",
      "objection": "Concerns THIS PERSON raised",
      "automation_opportunity": "Specific automation identified for THIS PERSON",
      "quote": "Exact words from the customer if available"
    }
  ]
}

If no SPECIFIC, NAMED customers are discussed, return empty array.

Extract ZANE'S PERSONAL REFLECTIONS about himself and his business journey.

Personal reflections are moments where Zane:
- Realizes something about himself: "I'm not shallow, and that changes the game"
- Identifies an internal tension: "I'm caught between integrity and survival anxiety"
- Has self-doubt: "Maybe wanting depth is my downfall"
- Reframes his thinking: "My dislike of voice AI is discernment, not resistance"
- Questions his approach: "Am I avoiding something out of fear or values?"
- Recognizes patterns: "I light up when building Mandy but dread selling voice bots"

DO NOT extract:
- Business facts
- Market observations
- Things about customers
- Strategic insights (those go in strategic_insights)

ONLY extract moments of SELF-AWARENESS about Zane's:
- Identity as a builder
- Values and what matters to him
- Internal struggles and tensions
- Self-doubt or breakthroughs
- Emotional patterns

Return JSON:
{
  "reflections": [
    {
      "reflection_type": "self_doubt|insight|values_clarification|breakthrough|struggle",
      "reflection": "Zane's actual realization (in his voice if possible)",
      "topic": "depth_vs_speed|integrity|fear|motivation|identity|business_approach",
      "emotional_tone": "uncertain|excited|frustrated|clear|relieved|struggling"
    }
  ]
}

Extract STRATEGIC INSIGHTS that connect patterns across Zane's journey.

Strategic insights are META-OBSERVATIONS that:
- Identify Zane's unique strengths or positioning
- Reveal patterns in how he works or decides
- Connect multiple data points from the conversation
- Suggest market positioning or competitive advantage
- Highlight risks or opportunities specific to him

DO NOT extract:
- General business advice
- Obvious observations
- Things that apply to everyone
- Zane's own reflections (those go in personal_reflections)

ONLY extract insights that are:
- Specific to Zane's situation
- Connect multiple elements
- Provide strategic direction
- Come from synthesizing the conversation

These should feel like insights from a BUSINESS ADVISOR who knows Zane well.

Return JSON:
{
  "insights": [
    {
      "insight_category": "business_model|positioning|market_fit|personal_growth",
      "insight": "One clear sentence observation",
      "supporting_evidence": ["quote or fact from conversation that supports this"],
      "confidence": "high|medium|speculative",
      "actionable": true,
      "suggested_action": "what Zane could do with this insight"
    }
  ]
}

Extract ACTIONABLE TASKS from this conversation.

Tasks are specific things Zane:
- Said he would do
- Was suggested to do (by the AI) and acknowledged
- Needs to follow up on
- Should research or explore

DO NOT extract:
- Vague intentions
- General principles
- Things already completed in the conversation

Return JSON:
{
  "tasks": [
    {
      "task": "Clear, actionable task description",
      "context": "Why this task matters (from conversation)",
      "urgency": "immediate|this_week|soon|someday",
      "category": "build|outreach|research|content|personal|follow_up"
    }
  ]
}

If no clear tasks were identified, return empty array.

Summarize this conversation in a way that makes it FINDABLE and USEFUL later.

Return JSON:
{
  "main_theme": "One clear sentence: what was THIS SPECIFIC conversation about?",
  "sub_themes": ["specific topic 1", "specific topic 2", "specific topic 3"],
  "conversation_type": "strategic|tactical|emotional_processing|brainstorm|problem_solving",
  "business_relevance": "critical|high|medium|low|personal",
  "contains_decisions": true,
  "contains_customer_insights": false,
  "contains_personal_breakthrough": true,
  "contains_action_items": true,
  "key_takeaways": ["specific insight 1", "specific insight 2", "specific insight 3"]
}

body.title: Exciting AI Chatbot Demo for Green Machine
body.transcript:
USER: Hey can you tailor this email to be bit more exciting and brief?

Hey Green Machine team,
Hope you’re having a great week!
Just wanted to follow up on my last email and share something exciting—we’ve got your custom AI chatbot up and running in demo form!
You can check it out here: https://customaisolutions.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/304b5379-24ca-44f8-9848-bf4313c7ebb4/chat
It’s designed to handle common customer questions, help users find the right plants, and free up your team’s time—while keeping that friendly, helpful Green Machine tone. The current version is using a basic knowledge base, so we’d love your input to fine-tune it and add anything you’d like it to know.
The AI chatbot can easily be embedded into your website with just a simple script. You’ll have full control over its appearance and functionality, so it can blend seamlessly with your site’s design. Whether it's tweaking colors, fonts, or the chat window’s position, you can make it look and feel exactly like the chatbot we have on our own website—tailored to match your brand and specific needs.
Here are a few trickier questions you can try out to test it:
* “What’s a good native plant for a windy coastal site?”
* “Do you have any fast-growing groundcovers for shade?”
Let me know what you think!
Cheers, Zane Custom AI Solutions customaisolutions.nz

CLAUDE: I'd be happy to make this email more exciting and brief. Here's a revised version:

Subject: Your Green Machine AI Chatbot is LIVE! 🌱

Hi Green Machine team!

Great news – your custom AI chatbot is ready for test drives!

➡️ Try it now: https://customaisolutions.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/304b5379-24ca-44f8-9848-bf4313c7ebb4/chat

This smart assistant handles customer FAQs, helps match shoppers with perfect plants, and frees up your team—all while maintaining that signature Green Machine personality!

The bot integrates seamlessly into your website with one simple script. You'll have complete control over its look and feel to match your branding perfectly.

Challenge it with questions like:
• "What's a good native plant for a windy coastal site?"
• "Do you have fast-growing groundcovers for shade?"

What do you think? We'd love your feedback to make it even smarter!

Cheers,
Zane
Custom AI Solutions
customaisolutions.nz

USER: Could we add a piece where we express that we can give the AI agent behind the chat bot tools to increase functionality and customise it to work with their business and automate the boring stuff

CLAUDE: Here's the updated email with the added information about AI tools and automation:

Subject: Your Green Machine AI Chatbot is LIVE! 🌱

Hi Green Machine team!

Great news – your custom AI chatbot is ready for test drives!

➡️ Try it now: https://customaisolutions.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/304b5379-24ca-44f8-9848-bf4313c7ebb4/chat

This smart assistant handles customer FAQs, helps match shoppers with perfect plants, and frees up your team—all while maintaining that signature Green Machine personality!

The real power? We can equip your AI with specialized tools to automate your business processes! From checking inventory and processing orders to scheduling deliveries and managing customer accounts—your chatbot can handle the tedious tasks so your team can focus on what they do best.

The bot integrates seamlessly into your website with one simple script. You'll have complete control over its look and feel to match your branding perfectly.

Challenge it with questions like:
• "What's a good native plant for a windy coastal site?"
• "Do you have fast-growing groundcovers for shade?"

What do you think? We'd love your feedback to make it even smarter!

Cheers,
Zane
Custom AI Solutions
customaisolutions.nz

USER: Can we just keep it really brief that in future we could look into adding these tools and functionality

CLAUDE: Here's the updated email with a briefer mention of future tools and functionality:

Subject: Your Green Machine AI Chatbot is LIVE! 🌱

Hi Green Machine team!

Great news – your custom AI chatbot is ready for test drives!

➡️ Try it now: https://customaisolutions.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/304b5379-24ca-44f8-9848-bf4313c7ebb4/chat

This smart assistant handles customer FAQs, helps match shoppers with perfect plants, and frees up your team—all while maintaining that signature Green Machine personality!

The bot integrates seamlessly into your website with one simple script, with full control over its appearance to match your branding.

Plus, we can explore adding tools later that let your AI automate inventory checks, orders, and other routine tasks!

Challenge it with questions like:
• "What's a good native plant for a windy coastal site?"
• "Do you have fast-growing groundcovers for shade?"

What do you think? We'd love your feedback!

Cheers,
Zane
Custom AI Solutions
customaisolutions.nz

USER: Can we make the link different text?

CLAUDE: Here's the updated email with different text for the link:

Subject: Your Green Machine AI Chatbot is LIVE! 🌱

Hi Green Machine team!

Great news – your custom AI chatbot is ready for test drives!

➡️ [Take it for a spin here!](https://customaisolutions.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/304b5379-24ca-44f8-9848-bf4313c7ebb4/chat)
